parcel_id.layBody: The county parcel identification number as printed here (often 9 digits once formatting is trimmed). Compare to your bill or county record when verifying identity.
official: TODO: Arapahoe PIN zero-padding rule for comps vs NOV print.
Secondary formatting discipline: Legacy UAD 2.6 Appendix D (currency and reporting strictness norms) does not redefine county PIN meanings.

street_number.layBody: The numeric portion of the situs street address.
official: TODO: Arapahoe situs formatting glossary if available.

street_name.layBody: Street name without the trailing street type suffix.
official: TODO: Arapahoe situs abbreviation rules when available.

street_type.layBody: County suffix like ST or CIR that follows the street name.
official: TODO: Arapahoe USPS-style vs internal abbreviations if published.

apt_number.layBody: Unit label when tracked. Blank vs masked placeholders mean the grid does not display a unit; that is different from verifying whether a condo unit exists elsewhere.
official: TODO: Arapahoe unit field definition on comps extracts.

dwelling.layBody: County-style yes or no indicator for dwelling classification.
official: TODO: Enumerate acceptable codes across NOV comps samples before asserting meaning.

time_adj_sale_price.layBody: Modeled comparable sale amount after the county schedules it to match the appraisal date. It is not the same concept as today's market list price.
official: Secondary reporting-format discipline reference: Legacy UAD 2.6 Appendix D (currency fields). County layout still wins.
TODO: Cite county time-adjust method summary.

original_sale_price.layBody: County reference sale amount before modeled adjustments.
official: Secondary formatting reference: Legacy UAD 2.6 Appendix D (currency).
TODO: Tie wording to deed or contract terminology Arapahoe uses.

concessions_and_pp.layBody: Often seller credits or other offsets that require adjustment versus the naked sale price.
official: TODO: Arapahoe definition for PP and concessions on this worksheet (label is ambiguous in PDF alone).
Secondary reference only: Legacy UAD 2.6 Appendix D for currency punctuation discipline.

parcel_number.layBody: Internal parcel-account string formatted by the county. Keep it verbatim for records calls.
official: TODO: Crosswalk parcel number versus PIN wording from assessor glossary.

neighborhood.layBody: Internal neighborhood bucket for comparable pooling, usually numeric.
official: TODO: Map published neighborhood code glossary if permitted.

neighborhood_group.layBody: Broader roll-up grouping when narrower neighborhoods lack sales.
official: TODO: Describe county widening rules with a methodology cite.

luc.layBody: County grouping code for allowable land-use context inside their models.
official: TODO: DOLA assessor glossary or county codebook excerpt.

allocated_land_val.layBody: County-modeled land allocation inside the modeled value breakdown.
official: Secondary formatting reference: Legacy UAD 2.6 Appendix D (currency).
TODO: Cite statutory or methodology note tying land-vs-improvement split.
TODO: Explain county improvement code book when available.

improvement_style.layBody: More granular improvement style wording within the modeled type bucket.
official: TODO: Explain county coding when available.

year_built.layBody: Original construction vintage when known. Printed zero means unavailable or none for modeling.
official: TODO: Explain assessor sourcing for effective year.

remodel_year.layBody: Major modeled remodel indicator when populated. Printed zero reads as none.
official: TODO: County definition of remodeled vs maintenance.

valuation_grade.layBody: County shorthand grade for modeled quality versus condition tiers.
official: TODO: Narrate grade ladders from assessor materials.

living_area.layBody: Finished living-area square footage per county appraisal rules.

basement_garden_lvl.layBody: County square footage bucket for partially below-grade shells.

finish_bsmt_grdn_lvl.layBody: Finished portion counted inside basement or garden stacks.

walkout_basement.layBody: Walk-out basement modeled square footage when flagged.

attached_garage.layBody: Garage modeled square footage attached to the dwelling.

detached_garage.layBody: Detached garage modeled evidence. Sometimes prints as zero-area.

deck_terrace.layBody: Deck modeled footprint counted for adjustments.

total_bath_count.layBody: Composite bathroom measure; half baths sometimes print as halves.

fireplaces.layBody: Count of modeled fireplaces influencing adjustments.

regression_valuation.layBody: Statistical modeled indication from county regression schedule.

valuation_label.layBody: Section heading for summarized dollars at the worksheet bottom.

sale_date.layBody: County recorded sale-event date comparable uses.
official: Secondary formatting reference: Legacy UAD 2.6 Appendix D (date discipline). Conflicts defer to county print.

valuation_time_adj_sale_price.layBody: Repeated time-adjust reference near the summarized valuation lines; treat semantics as distinct JSON key until more samples prove alignment.

adjusted_sale_price.layBody: County comparable price after modeled attribute adjustments versus the subject parcel.

adj_mkt.layBody: Final modeled market reconciliation cell the county labeled here. Printed blanks in sale slots still mean no additional figures on this row.
